name: generate_image
description: Generate one or more images from a text prompt using DALL-E 3 or DALL-E 2. DALL-E 3 produces high-quality images in various sizes and supports 'vivid' or 'natural' styles. Returns image URLs or base64-encoded image data.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Model to use: 'dall-e-3' (default, higher quality) or 'dall-e-2'.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Text description of the desired image (max 4000 characters for DALL-E 3, 1000 for DALL-E 2).

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of images to generate (1 for DALL-E 3, 1-10 for DALL-E 2). Default 1.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Image size: '1024x1024' (default), '1024x1792', or '1792x1024' for DALL-E 3. Also '256x256' and '512x512' for DALL-E 2.

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: Image quality: 'standard' (default) or 'hd' (finer detail, DALL-E 3 only).

parameters.name: style
parameters.description: Image style: 'vivid' (default, hyper-real/dramatic) or 'natural' (more natural, less hyper-real). DALL-E 3 only.

parameters.name: response_format
parameters.description: Format of the response: 'url' (default, temporary URL) or 'b64_json' (base64-encoded image).

body.prompt: A serene Japanese garden in autumn with a wooden bridge over a koi pond, soft morning light filtering through red maple leaves, watercolor painting style

data.revised_prompt: A tranquil Japanese garden scene during autumn. A curved wooden bridge arches gracefully over a peaceful koi pond. Soft golden morning light filters through vibrant red maple leaves, casting warm dappled shadows. The scene is rendered in a delicate watercolor painting style with soft edges and gentle color washes.
